verified: Official FTMO Trading Objectives page - verified 2026-04-16
description: Global prop firm. 1-Step and 2-Step evaluations. MetaTrader 5.

1-step.description: 10% of Initial Simulated Capital. All positions must be closed before review. No target on subsequent Rewards Account.

3% of Initial Simulated Capital. Recalculated at midnight CE(S)T from previous day's balance. Formula: balance_at_midnight - 3% * initial. Limit can increase AND decrease. Includes floating P/L, commissions, swaps.
10% EOD Trailing. Recalculated at midnight CE(S)T as: max(highest_EOD_balance, initial) - 10% * initial. Limit can only INCREASE, never decrease. Includes floating P/L.
Best day (highest profit day from closed trades) cannot exceed 50% of Positive Days' Profit. Not a breach — must continue trading until satisfied. Calculated at midnight CE(S)T.
Standard accounts: no trading 2 min before/after high-impact news. Swing accounts: allowed.

2-step.description: 10% in FTMO Challenge, 5% in Verification. All positions must be closed. Example: $100K account = $10K target.
5% of initial balance, always. Measured from midnight CE(S)T balance. Sum of closed P/L + floating P/L of open positions. Breach = challenge failed.
10% of initial balance, static. Equity cannot drop below 90% of initial at any time. Example: $100K account, floor = $90K forever.
4 minimum trading days. At least one position initiated per day. Days don't need to be consecutive. Day boundary = midnight CE(S)T.
Standard accounts: no trading 2 min before/after high-impact news. Swing accounts: allowed.
